Cerios pill CTA — use for every action; full-pill shape with an optional leading arrow.

```jsx
<Button variant="primary" href="/vacatures">Onze vacatures</Button>
<Button variant="cream">Over Cerios</Button>
<Button variant="navy">Wat we doen</Button>
```

Variants: `primary` (mint green on navy text — the main CTA), `cream` (soft neutral), `navy` (dark), `outline-on-dark` (transparent hairline, for dark hero bands). Sizes `sm`/`md`/`lg`. Set `arrow={false}` to drop the arrow.
